name: Hoax.ai Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype v1 Static Content Contract
required_visible_statements: Internal static prototype. Non-public web surface. No engine. No classifier. No upload. No scoring. No verdict.
This static prototype explores the Evidence Chamber interface direction.
Evidence is structured before it is believed, escalated, published, or judged.
fictional_placeholder_policy: All visible content must use fictional placeholder labels only. No real entities, events, accusations, or external factual claims.
non_authorization_statement: Content contract governs static placeholder content only. It does not authorize generated analysis, scoring, fake/real output, or operational behavior.
